violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed without proper hair restraint. Food employee did not have her hair restrained. Food employees should have hair restrained.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food prepared and packaged by a processing plant was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days after original package was opened. Deli beef found not date marked. Deli turkey found past 10 days of preparation in zippered bag. Potentially hazardous foods should be dated so they can be discarded properly within 10 days.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Plates found stored on the floor of the storage area. Single use items should be kept off of the floor.
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
